script: echo '===== Diff: Aixa (working) vs Emily (broken) — only the post_reply chain area =====' && diff <(sed -n '350,430p' /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py) <(sed -n '350,430p' /home/azureuser/emily-claude-responder.py) | head -60; echo; echo '===== Aixa post_reply chain =====' && sed -n '355,410p' /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py; echo; echo '===== Emily post_reply chain =====' && sed -n '355,410p' /home/azureuser/emily-claude-responder.py
